mapper.select: select t.* from base_resource_authority ra inner join base_menu t on ra.resource_id = t.id and ra.authority_id = #{authorityId} and ra.authority_type = #{authorityType} and ra.resource_type = 'menu' order by t.order_num asc

select distinct t.* from base_resource_authority ra inner join base_menu t on ra.resource_id = t.id and ra.authority_id in ( select group_id from base_group_member where user_id = #{userId} union select group_id from base_group_leader where user_id = #{userId} ) and ra.authority_type = 'group' and ra.resource_type = 'menu' order by t.order_num asc

select distinct t.* from base_resource_authority ra inner join base_menu t on ra.resource_id = t.id and ra.authority_id in ( select group_id from base_group_member where user_id = #{userId} union select group_id from base_group_leader where user_id = #{userId} ) and ra.authority_type = 'group' and ra.resource_type = 'menu' where t.parent_id = -1 order by t.order_num asc

select distinct t.* from base_resource_authority ra inner join base_menu t on ra.resource_id = t.id and ra.authority_id in ( select group_id from base_group_member where user_id = #{userId} union select group_id from base_group_leader where user_id = #{userId} ) and ra.authority_type = 'group' and ra.resource_type = 'menu' and ra.authority_id = #{groupId} order by t.order_num asc

select distinct t.* from base_resource_authority ra inner join base_menu t on ra.resource_id = t.id and ra.authority_type = 'user' and ra.resource_type = 'menu' and ra.authority_id = #{userId} and ra.parent_id = #{appId} order by t.order_num asc

select distinct t.code,t.type,t.name,t.uri,t.method,m.title as menu_id from base_resource_authority ra inner join base_element t on ra.resource_id = t.id and ra.authority_id in ( select group_id from base_group_member where user_id = #{userId} union select group_id from base_group_leader where user_id = #{userId} ) and ra.authority_type = 'group' and ra.resource_type = 'button' inner join base_menu m on t.menu_id = m.id

select distinct t.code,t.type,t.name,t.uri,t.method,m.title as menu_id from base_resource_authority ra inner join base_element t on ra.resource_id = t.id and ra.authority_id in ( select group_id from base_group_member where user_id = #{userId} union select group_id from base_group_leader where user_id = #{userId} ) and ra.authority_type = 'group' and ra.resource_type = 'button' inner join base_menu m on t.menu_id = m.id

select distinct t.code,t.type,t.name,t.uri,t.method,m.title as menu_id from base_resource_authority ra inner join base_element t on ra.resource_id = t.id and authority_id = #{userId} and ra.authority_type = 'user' and ra.resource_type = 'button' inner join base_menu m on t.menu_id = m.id
select distinct t.* from base_resource_authority ra inner join base_element t on ra.resource_id = t.id and ra.authority_type = 'group' and ra.resource_type = 'button' and t.menu_id = #{menuId}
select distinct t.code,t.type,t.name,t.uri,t.method,m.title as menu_id from base_element t inner join base_menu m on t.menu_id = m.id

SELECT a.id id, a.app_name text, a.logo icon, IF ( ad.dependent_app_id IS NULL,-1, ad.dependent_app_id ) AS parentId, IF( IF ( ad.dependent_app_id IS NULL,-1, ad.dependent_app_id ) = m_app.parent_app_id,1, 0 ) checked FROM app_info a LEFT JOIN app_dependent ad ON a.id = ad.app_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM merchant_app ma WHERE ma.merchant_id = #{merchantId} ) m_app ON a.id = m_app.app_id and IF ( ad.dependent_app_id IS NULL,-1, ad.dependent_app_id ) = m_app.parent_app_id where a.status = 1 order by a.id;
SELECT app.* from base_group bg LEFT JOIN base_group_member bgm on bgm.group_id = bg.id LEFT JOIN app_info app on app.id = bg.`code` WHERE bgm.user_id = #{userId} and app.app_type=1
SELECT app.* from base_group bg LEFT JOIN base_group_member bgm on bgm.group_id = bg.id LEFT JOIN app_info app on app.id = bg.`code` WHERE bgm.user_id = #{userId} and app.app_type=3

SELECT app.*,bgm.parent_group_id from base_group bg LEFT JOIN base_group_member bgm on bgm.group_id = bg.id LEFT JOIN app_info app on app.id = bg.`code` WHERE bgm.user_id = #{userId} and app.app_type=2 and bgm.parent_group_id= #{parentGroupId}
select distinct ra.* from base_resource_authority ra LEFT JOIN base_group bg on ra.authority_id = bg.id WHERE ra.authority_type = 'group' and bg.`code` = #{appId}

select bg1.id id,if(bg2.id is null,-1,bg2.id) parentId,app_info.app_name as 'name',app_info.status as 'status' ,bg1.code appId,app_info.provider,bg2.code parentAppId from base_group_member bgm left join base_group bg1 on bgm.group_id = bg1.id left join base_group bg2 on bgm.parent_group_id = bg2.id LEFT JOIN app_info app_info on bg1.`code` = app_info.id where bgm.user_id = #{userId} and bg1.group_type=2
